name: Drift Before Direct Symmetry Detection
claim: drift becomes detectable before direct symmetry detection.

name: Instant-Break Reversal
claim: direct symmetry detection appears at or before drift in an instant-break regime.

name: Fixed-Budget Sensitivity
claim: under a fixed practical observation budget, drift is the more sensitive detector.

name: Exact Alarm-Time Separation
claim: at the drift alarm time, direct symmetry is still below its own detection threshold.
